Hey everyone, this is Russell Brunson and welcome back to Funnel University. Today's class, I'm going to be walking you through a funnel that is one of my favorite. It's interesting, like in the last, probably a year and a half, two years, I haven't seen many people doing video sales that are funnels anymore. And I don't know if that's because we don't do a lot of them or what, but they work and they continue to work and they're amazing. And I want to show you as one of my favorites because this funnel I see behind the scenes of it, I know the revenue they're doing and it's insane. And so it's a really good one to model, especially if you're going after cold traffic. They are killing it in freezing cold traffic. And so it's really cool. And so the company name is Ario Rockstar, one of my friends, Preston Ely built this funnel. He's one of the coolest dudes in the real estate market. He's been so much fun to watch. And this funnel I swear to look at like once or twice a week and it's just one of my favorites. So I'm excited to show it to you guys and share with you guys how it all works. So it all begins over here. And there's two different landing pages they have based on where they're sending traffic, which is the big reason I wanted you guys to see this. This right here is like an advertorial. It's called financial freedom report. And it's here talking about this exposed loophole, how house flippers are making money with zero out of pocket. And this is, it looks like an article and it is an article. And so with cold traffic, typically, we know with warm traffic, you can drive people to videos or webinars, all sorts of stuff. But a lot of times when you go into that cold, cold, cold traffic, people don't know who you are, they're scared, whatever that might be. And so this is a way to bring somebody into your world in a non-threatening way and get them warmed up. But we talked about how to convert cold traffic. It's all about this kind of concept, pre-sell pages like this. So this is where they drive all their freezing cold traffic to. It's an article about how people make a bunch of money through real estate out of pocket. And then from there, it pushes directly to the video sales letter you see over here. So that's, that's what they're driving freezing cold traffic. Now warm traffic, they're driving to this page right here, which again is one of my favorite squeeze pages I've ever seen for a few reasons. First off, it looks awesome. I'm going to start using it because I think it's super awesome. So if you come down here, I'll show you the pricing strategy behind this. So they sell it for $197. $197 is their first upsell here. And then what's cool is they're selling this thing. It is amazing, you want it. And then if you say yes, obviously it builds your card $197. But if you say no, that takes you right here to the downsell. Okay, now if you say yes, it bypasses. But if you say no, it takes you downsell. And it's basically, presence saying wait, hold on, if you can't afford it, I get it. The reason is you don't have money. So what we're gonna do is we're gonna give you a payment plan. Now they've got two options, either three payments of $67 or just pay it in full again. So it's basically the same offers right here where they get a payment plan. So you're offering a payment plan on the downsell, which I think is really, really cool. So that's basically upsell and downsell number one. Then from their transitions to the next one, which this is their continuity offers. Come over here, basically it's upsell too, saying hey, get these eight training sessions for free. They are amazing. And all these sessions for free when you purchase their continuity program. And here's all the benefits of the continuity program. It's pretty awesome. Their pricing is $97 a month. So $97 a month, you get all this stuff. It is amazing, you're gonna love it. So you say yes, boom, it starts building $97 a month. You know, obviously a lot of people aren't gonna be $97 a month. So if you say no to that, then the downsell to that is like, all right, all right, how about this? We'll still give you all that stuff, but let's let you take a trial. So basically, sign up right now. It's completely free for the next 30 days. Go through it and then in 30 days, if you love it, you'll be building $97. So that way the people that are willing to pay upfront, they'll pay upfront. And then those who don't, then on the downsell, then they offer you the free trial afterwards, which I think is kind of a cool concept and they dump you on the thank you page afterwards. So that's kind of how that funnel works. Is that exciting for you guys? I love seeing when people effectively use downsells because they're really, really powerful. We did a test on that before and actually it was crazy how people did and it paid in full over here. They just had to have one more little push over the edge. So there's the downsell. And then either from here or from here, both of these now take you to the second upsell, which again is their continuity program, which is $97 a month. And if you say no to that, then it downsells you to downsell to the 30 day free trial. And that you guys is their funnel. And I think it's powerful. I know again, this one's cool because it's kind of more traditional video sales that are funneled, but they are converting amazing to cold traffic. And the reasons, there's a couple reasons. First off, they've got the pre-sell page that they convert good to cold traffic. Powerful sales video, which helps in the monetization and they have a great upsell, downsell sequence that monetizes and pulls out enough money up here to help cover all the ad costs. And then back here becomes their continuity where they can continue to make money each month from all the people who go through this funnel. So that is the VSL funnel that Ariel Rock starts using. So for you guys, if you don't have video sales letter yet, this is one of the funnels that I look at, that I model all the time. And I think that is a powerful one for you guys to use as well.
